events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario: bearings & seals work in progress, observed field condition is over-greasing (purged seal). This is a defect - over-greasing can purge seals, cause overheating, seal damage. The seal has been purged, meaning grease has escaped past the seal, indicating the seal may be compromised or over-lubricated.

Sequence violation: over-greasing suggests lubrication was done improperly - likely too much grease applied, possibly before proper mounting/alignment checks, or grease quantity not per spec. The seal is purged = defective condition.

Decision: fail (non-compliant/defective condition)
Risk: medium-high (over-greasing can cause overheating, seal failure, bearing failure)
Component conditions: installed-defective (seal purged), possibly degraded
Percent complete: in-progress, maybe 70%
Actions: stop, purge excess grease, inspect seal, replace if damaged, relubricate to spec, verify alignment/mounting.
Order: proper sequence would be verify mounting/alignment → verify seal condition → lubricate to specified quantity → confirm no purge → test.

Let me write the JSON.
